title: Claude Fable + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a content creation workflow using Claude to automate video editing for YouTube channels. The pipeline combines script writing, voice recording, and automated video stitching via Higsfield CLI to produce faceless or talking-head content at approximately $2 per video.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a content creation workflow that uses Claude to automate video editing for YouTube channels. The pipeline ties together script writing, voice recording, and automated video stitching through the Higsfield CLI, producing faceless or talking-head content at roughly $2 per video. The framing positions the system as a path toward $30,000 per month, with the low per-video cost as the central economic argument.
